inline_comments.message:
wouldn't be better to replace with 

echo "Going to create $SDC_USER"
echo "create role IF NOT EXISTS $SDC_USER with password='$SDC_PASSWORD' AND LOGIN = true AND ACCESS TO ALL DATACENTERS;" | cqlsh -u cassandra -p $CS_PASSWORD $CASSANDRA_IP $CASSANDRA_PORT
echo "grant all permissions on all keyspaces to $SDC_USER;" | cqlsh -u cassandra -p $CS_PASSWORD $CASSANDRA_IP $CASSANDRA_PORT
echo "cassandra user $SDC_USER successfully created"

according to https://docs.datastax.com/en/cql-oss/3.x/cql/cql_reference/cqlCreateRole.html
this parameter not supported, please remove it
